commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=39f29850390d739f378037f8342c999cfed1064c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads a session-derived `agentId` through Control UI Skill Workshop proposal list, inspect, apply, reject, and related detail-loading paths.

PR surface: Source +32. Total +32 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked report plus current source show the UI sends unscoped proposal requests while Gateway scopes unscoped requests to the default agent, so non-default agent proposals are source-reproducible without a new backend API.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review/contributor action is needed because the patch has a compatibility bug and missing live behavior proof; ClawSweeper repair should not take over while contributor-side proof is still required.

target.title: fix(ui): route skill workshop RPCs through current session agent
target.body:
## Summary
- Pass the current session's `agentId` to all Skill Workshop Gateway RPCs (`skills.proposals.list`, `skills.proposals.inspect`, `skills.proposals.apply`, `skills.proposals.reject`) instead of letting the Gateway fall back to the default agent.
- Resolve `agentId` from `sessionKey` in the Control UI so workshop proposals are fetched from the same agent workspace that the user is chatting with.
- This aligns Control UI behavior with the CLI (`skills workshop --agent <id> list`), which already supports per-agent workshop queries.

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` type-checks cleanly
- [x] `pnpm build` completes successfully
- [x] `pnpm test src/skills/workshop/service.test.ts src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.test.ts` passes

## Verification
Behavior addressed: Control UI Skill Workshop shows empty when the active session belongs to a non-default agent, even though `skills workshop --agent <id> list` CLI shows proposals.
Real environment tested: Linux, Node v22.22.0
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `pnpm format` — no changes
2. `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` — passes with no type errors
3. `pnpm build` — builds UI and runtime successfully
4. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/skills/workshop/service.test.ts src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.test.ts` — all tests pass
Evidence after fix: Workshop controller functions now accept `agentId` and forward it to the Gateway. The Gateway's `resolveSkillsAgentWorkspace` already supports `agentId` in params, so passing it routes requests to the correct agent workspace.
Observed result after fix: No runtime behavior change for default-agent sessions; non-default agent sessions will now see their own workshop proposals in the Control UI.
What was not tested: Live Gateway + Control UI integration test (would require starting a real Gateway and creating a skill proposal via a non-default agent).

Fixes #90756
target.author: zhouhe-xydt
